nasb.text: See, the Lord your God has placed the land before you; go up, take possession, as the Lord, the God of your fathers, has spoken to you. Do not fear or be dismayed.’

esv.text: See, the Lord your God has set the land before you. Go up, take possession, as the Lord, the God of your fathers, has told you. Do not fear or be dismayed.’

cnv.text: 看哪，耶和華你的　神已經把這地擺在你面前；你要照著耶和華你列祖的　神告訴你的上去，佔領那地；不要害怕，也不要驚惶。’

ccb.text: 看啊，你们祖先的上帝耶和华已把那片土地赐给你们，你们要照着祂的应许去占领那里，不要惧怕，不要气馁。’
